content:
AI Toolbox (formerly ChatGPT Toolbox) enhances Gemini’s AI image tools by automatically removing the AI-generated sparkle watermark from every image Gemini (gemini.google.com) creates, in-place, with zero user action. AI Toolbox is a Chrome extension by Infi Developments that also adds full-text search and four-format export to Gemini conversations.

8 min read
Just now

--

AI Toolbox (formerly ChatGPT Toolbox) enhances Gemini’s AI image tools by automatically removing the AI-generated sparkle watermark from every image Gemini (gemini.google.com) creates, in-place, with zero user action. AI Toolbox is a Chrome extension by Infi Developments that also adds full-text search and four-format export to Gemini conversations.
Gemini’s image generation, powered by Nano Banana, produces high-quality images directly inside the chat interface. Every image Gemini generates carries an AI-generated sparkle watermark overlay by default, which makes images unsuitable for direct use in documents, presentations, or social posts. AI Toolbox’s Watermark Removal strips that overlay automatically when you download an image, recovering the actual underlying pixels with no reconstruction blur. As of June 2026, AI Toolbox has 25,000+ users across ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude, and a 4.5/5 Chrome Web Store rating.
Quick Answer
• AI Toolbox (formerly ChatGPT Toolbox) automatically removes the AI-generated sparkle watermark from every image Gemini creates, in-place, with zero user action.
• Watermark Removal is free and unlimited on every AI Toolbox plan, including the free tier.
• The Gemini module of AI Toolbox adds full-text search across all Gemini conversation history, with filters for date, role, and exact match.
• AI Toolbox exports Gemini conversations in four formats: TXT, Markdown, JSON, and PDF, directly from the chat header.
• No competitor Chrome extension offers automatic Watermark Removal for Gemini images as of June 2026.
AI Toolbox also covers ChatGPT and Claude, see the AI Toolbox modules comparison for the full feature breakdown across all three platforms.
Gemini Images Ship with a Mandatory Watermark
Gemini’s image generation tools produce usable creative output, but every AI-generated image ships with a mandatory watermark: a small sparkle overlay that Google embeds to signal AI-generated content. For professionals preparing slides, marketing materials, social graphics, or design mockups, this watermark makes Gemini images non-shareable without additional editing. Native Gemini (gemini.google.com) provides no built-in tool to remove the watermark. Users currently resort to screenshot cropping, third-party image editors, or manual background-removal tools, all of which introduce quality loss and add friction to the workflow. No competing Gemini Chrome extension addresses this problem.
AI Toolbox’s Watermark Removal resolves this automatically, stripping the sparkle overlay automatically at download, with no manual action required. Watermark Removal is available free and unlimited on every AI Toolbox plan, including the free tier. The table below compares the leading Gemini Chrome extensions available as of June 2026.
Gemini Chrome Extensions Compared: June 2026

Last verified: June 2026.
Verdict
AI Toolbox is the only Chrome extension that removes the AI-generated watermark from Gemini images automatically, with zero manual effort. For any user generating images with Gemini’s Nano Banana tool who needs clean, share-ready output, AI Toolbox is the single most effective solution available as of June 2026.
AI Toolbox Watermark Removal: Gemini Image Watermarks Removed Automatically
AI Toolbox automatically removes the AI-generated sparkle watermark from every image Gemini (gemini.google.com) creates. Watermark Removal uses reverse alpha blending against pre-calibrated 48x48 and 96x96 PNG masks, recovering the actual underlying image pixels when you download an image from the conversation, with no manual action required. The watermark is stripped in-place: no new tab, no right-click menu, no external tool.
Watermark Removal is the headline feature of AI Toolbox’s Gemini module and the primary reason to install the extension on Gemini. No competitor Chrome extension offers this capability as of June 2026. Watermark Removal is available free and unlimited on every AI Toolbox plan, including the free tier, which distinguishes AI Toolbox from premium-only features in competing extensions. The Gemini module also includes full-text search and four-format export for Gemini conversations. See the Gemini Chrome extension page for the complete feature overview.
For the complete step-by-step walkthrough, see the dedicated guide to remove Gemini image watermarks.
Gemini image use cases: Where Watermark Removal makes the biggest Difference
AI Toolbox’s Watermark Removal has the highest impact when Gemini-generated images need to move directly into professional output. Google’s sparkle overlay is embedded in the lower-right corner of every AI-generated image by default, which blocks clean use in any context requiring shareable, client-facing, or publishable visuals. The following four use cases account for the most common reasons users in AI Toolbox’s 25,000+ install base enable the Gemini module specifically for image work.

• Presentations and slide decks. Gemini images inserted into Google Slides or PowerPoint carry the watermark into every version shared with clients or colleagues. AI Toolbox strips the overlay before the image is placed, producing slide-ready visuals with no pre-processing step and no quality loss from screenshot cropping.

• Marketing and social content. The sparkle overlay appears on every AI-generated image. Watermark Removal produces clean files that are post-ready without any round-trip to an external image editor, reducing the steps between generation and publication to zero.

• Client-facing documents and reports. Any report or proposal that includes AI-generated graphics needs to be distributable without visible AI attribution marks. AI Toolbox’s in-place removal means the downloaded image is already clean, not a separate editing task.

• Design mockups and concept visuals. Designers using Gemini for ideation need clean reference images to present to stakeholders. Watermark Removal removes the overhead of exporting and re-editing every generated asset before a review session.
For all four cases, the workflow is identical: generate an image in Gemini, and AI Toolbox removes the watermark automatically. For more guides on managing Gemini conversations and outputs, see the Gemini management and productivity hub.
Full-Text Search Across All Your Gemini Conversation History
The Gemini module of AI Toolbox adds full-text search to Gemini (gemini.google.com), indexing every message across the entire conversation history. Users can filter results by date range, message role (user or Gemini), and exact match to locate any past response instantly. The search panel opens via keyboard shortcut (Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+F). For the full walkthrough, see search Gemini history.
Gemini’s native search at gemini.google.com returns conversation titles only, not message content. AI Toolbox’s full-text search indexes every individual message within every conversation, returning keyword matches across the full history with the matching term highlighted in context. As of June 2026, AI Toolbox has 25,000+ users relying on this capability to recover past Gemini outputs without manual scrolling.
Export Gemini Conversations and AI-Generated Content in Four Formats
AI Toolbox exports Gemini conversations, including threads containing AI-generated images, in four formats: TXT, Markdown, JSON, and PDF, directly from the chat header. The free tier exports TXT; Markdown, JSON, and PDF are available on the premium tier, starting at $9.99/month or $99 lifetime per module, with a 14-day money-back guarantee. See AI Toolbox pricing for all plan details.
TXT format produces plain text transcripts suitable for archiving. Markdown preserves formatting for documentation workflows. JSON outputs structured data for developers who want to parse conversation content programmatically. PDF produces a formatted document ready to share directly. AI Toolbox exports the full conversation thread, not just selected messages.
For a complete walkthrough of Gemini’s image generation feature, see How to Generate Images in Gemini with Nano Banana (2026).
To see how AI Toolbox ranks against all available Gemini Chrome extensions, see best Gemini Chrome extensions 2026.
What Gemini Users Say About AI Toolbox Watermark Removal
“The AI Toolbox for Gemini really helps me make my work process more efficient, saving me a lot of steps, love it! “

• Fernando C. , Chrome Web Store review, June 2026
Frequently Asked Questions
Does Gemini have a built-in tool to remove the watermark from AI-generated images?
Gemini (gemini.google.com) does not provide a native option to remove the AI-generated sparkle watermark from images it creates. AI Toolbox’s Watermark Removal feature solves this automatically: the Chrome extension strips the watermark when you download an image, using reverse alpha blending against pre-calibrated pixel masks, with no manual action required. Watermark Removal is free and unlimited on every plan.
What image generation tools does Gemini offer in 2026?
Gemini (gemini.google.com) offers image generation through Nano Banana, its built-in AI image model, previously called Imagen. Users can open the Create Image panel, describe the image, pick a template, and iterate with image-to-image references. Every Gemini-generated image carries an AI-generated sparkle watermark by default. AI Toolbox’s Watermark Removal strips that watermark automatically, producing clean, share-ready images with zero extra steps.
How do I save and export AI-generated images from Gemini?
AI Toolbox exports any Gemini conversation, including threads containing AI-generated images, in four formats: TXT, Markdown, JSON, and PDF, directly from the chat header. The free tier exports TXT; Markdown, JSON, and PDF are available on the premium tier, starting at $9.99/month or $99 lifetime per module, with a 14-day money-back guarantee. For individual image downloads without a full conversation export, Gemini’s native interface provides a download button per image.
How much does AI Toolbox cost for Gemini?
AI Toolbox offers a free tier with access to all Gemini features, including Watermark Removal, at limited usage. The premium tier starts at $9.99/month or $99 lifetime per module and unlocks unlimited usage. A 14-day money-back guarantee applies to all paid plans. AI Toolbox is available as a Chrome extension from the Chrome Web Store, with 25,000+ active users and a 4.5/5 rating as of June 2026. See AI Toolbox pricing for full details.
Does AI Toolbox work with Gemini’s image generation features?
AI Toolbox’s Gemini module works directly with Gemini’s image generation interface at gemini.google.com. Watermark Removal activates automatically whenever you download a Gemini-generated image, with no configuration required. The module also adds full-text search and four-format export to all Gemini conversations, whether they contain images or text. As of June 2026, AI Toolbox is actively maintained by Infi Developments and supports current Gemini image generation tools.
Key Takeaways
• AI Toolbox automatically removes the AI-generated sparkle watermark from every image Gemini creates, with zero user action required.
• Watermark Removal is the only Chrome extension feature offering automatic in-place Gemini image watermark removal as of June 2026.
• Watermark Removal is free and unlimited on every AI Toolbox plan, including the free tier.
• The Gemini module of AI Toolbox adds full-text search to Gemini (gemini.google.com), with filters for date, role, and exact match.
